watcher.code:
watchers:
  - slug: account-health-monitor
    agent: sales
    schedule: 0 */12 * * *
    prompt: "Poll CRM data for tracked accounts. Track expansion progress, risk level changes, and renewal timeline."
    extraction_schema:
      type: object
      required: [risk_level, expansion_status, renewal_blockers, activity_delta]

agentToml.code:
[agents.sales]
name = "sales"
[[agents.sales.providers]]
id = "anthropic"
model = "claude/sonnet-4-5"
key = "$ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"
[memory]
enabled = true
org = "sales"
models = "./models"
data = "./data"

skill.code:
---
name: deliveroo-order
description: Read a restaurant's Deliveroo menu and assemble a group-order basket for the office lunch. Use in step 2 of the lunch run, after orders are collected. Reading menus and building a basket is allowed; completing checkout or touching payment is NOT.
nixPackages:
  - chromium
network:
  allow:
    - registry.npmjs.org
    - .npmjs.org
    # …2 more
  judge:
    - deliveroo.co.uk
    - .deliveroo.co.uk
    # …2 more
judges:
  default: "Allow GET reads + basket mutations; DENY checkout, payment, profile changes. Fail closed if unclear."
---
